titleStmt.title: SII 22.354: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 354. (A.R. No. 354 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE AKHILĀṆḌĒSVARĪ SHRINE. MĀR. SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA I—14th YEAR (A.D. 1229-30).

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumaḍandaiyum etc. It registers a gift of two (adjoining) pieces of land at Śikaranallūr in Kuṉṟiyūrnāḍu on the east bank of the river Veḷḷāṟu as tiruvēṭṭai-tiruttōppu to the temple of Tirunalakkuṉṟamuḍaiya-Nāyanār by Śaṅkaraṉ Kaṇḍaṉ alias Kalikaḍinda-Pāṇḍyadēvaṉ of Kuḷattūr in Malai-maṇḍalam after purchasing the same from some specified individuals, residents of the place. The purpose of the gift is evidently to provide a garden where the image of the god was taken in procession and worshipped on certain festival occasions as will be seen by No. 355 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum tiruppuyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalaimaṭantai[yum jayama]ṭantaiyum nalamkkoḷārnta ciṉavuriyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulantoṉṟu vāḷārnta poṟkaramel vākkaṭalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa Iruṅ m peruka karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa Orukuṭai niḻalkiḻ Irunilaṅ kuḷira muvakait
tamiḻum muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamum nali(ḷa)vuṭaṉ vaḷara Aivakai veḻviyum ceyviṉaiyiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camaiyamumaḻakuṭan tikaḻa Eḻuvakaip pāṭalumiyaluṭaṉ parava Eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cella koṅkar kaliṅkar kocalar māḷuvar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar ciṉar kuccarar villavar pāttivar vikkalar cempiyar pallavar mutaliyar pāttivar Ellā
moruvāḻi ṟoruvar muṟaimuṟai kaṭava tantiṟai kuṇarntiṟañciya Ilaṅ koḷir maṇimuṭi Intiraṉ pūṭṭiya viḷaṅkatirāmā ṉiṟpoliya paṉimalart tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaippa maṇimuṭi cūṭi poṉṉicūḻ ṇāṭṭup puliyāṇai peykalikaṉṉi naṭaikkayalāṇai kaivaḷar veñciṉar Ūḻiyum veḻamum parappi tañcaiyu muṟantaiyum centaḻal koḷutta kāliyu
nilamu makavaṉaṟuku vāriḻappa Āviyu maranu maḷinir nalanaḻittu tamiḻu māṭikaḷuṅ kopuramu māṭaraṅku māṭamu māḷikaiyu maṇṭapamum palaviṭitara toḻutu vantaṭaiyāta nirupartaṅ kotaiyar Aḻutakaṇṇirāṟu parappi kaḻutai koṇṭuḻutu kavaṭivicca cempiya ciṉam viriyap porutu ka veṭṭippaṉa pormuṉai muṭivaṟittup pāṇanukku kuṭuttaruḷi pāṭaluñciṟappiṟ parutivā pāṭakavaricai Āyirat taḷiyil ce
vaḷavaṉ Apiṣekamaṇṭapattu virar Apiṣekañceytu pukaḻiruntu talaipiṭuṅka miḷuntaṟukuṇa mataviṭāṉai melko ḻi vaiyyam muḻutum potukoḻittu kūrāḻiyuñ ceyya toḷumeykoṇṭu poy Aiyyappaṭāta Arumaṟaicerantaṇar vāḻun teyvappuliyūr tiruvellaiyil pukkup poṉṉampalam poliya vāṭuvār pūvaiyuḷ maṉṉun tirumeṉikaṇṭu maṉaṅka
ḷippak kola ṟaṅkuḷirt tuḻaciyu mālumaṟiyā malar cevaṭi vaṇaṅka vāṅku ciṟaippuṉat tuyiloḻiyavaṇṭeḻuppum pūṅkamala Āvi cūḻ pon ṉamaraāvatiyil Ottulakaṅ kākkum muyarmeruvait koṭattu vaittaṉaiya coti maṇi maṇṭapattiruntu colaimalai Aiyaṉc coṇāṭu tāṉiḻanta mālaimuṭiyun tāvaru veṉṟaḻaittu vānilattulaiya va
ntirukka ponni vaḷavaṉ(vaṉ) Urimaiyoṭum pukuttu peṟṟa mutal vaṇṇaniṉ poreṉṟu muṉkaviṭuvaṟṟi Ariyaṇaikiḻ viḻuntu toḻutu kaikalanta ttāṇṭār raviyum meṉi viṭṭakala tarumārveḷai nittiyam viṭṭapaṭik koṉṟaṅkitu piṭipāṭākaveṉap poṅku vicai cālattu muyarvā
viḷaṅka ṉṟun tirumukamum paṇṭiḻanta ceraṉpati Eṉṉu nāmamun ceraṉ kāruvam miḷa Uḻaṅki viṭai kuṭuttuviṭṭaruḷi vākaitti vaṭaventartam pātam montapaṇiya virakkaḻallaṇintu viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi vira ciṅṅātanattu vaṉaṅkeḻukavar Irumaruṅkicaippa kaviṇiyar muḻuṅku kaḷaṅkaliliyāṉai vempulattu
tirumaṇippuyam piriyā Ilaṅku kulam Arivaiyar toḻutu māṉilattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷaṅkiya komutal komāṟu panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu malaimaṇṭalattu kuḷattūr caṅkaran kaṇṭanāṉa
kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya tevanen kuṉṟiyūrṉāṭṭu cikaranallūr catti nampiyāna tampirān toḻaṉum tevar kotaṇṭavam perumāḷ perumāṉum perumāḷ nampiyum Utaiyan perumāḷum Āccampi kotaṇṭan Uḷḷiṭṭārum ventan Uṭaiyāṉum Ivvaṉaivarpakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya veḷḷā
ṟṟukku kiḻkkaraiyil Arai mā ceynilamum maṇittoṭṭamum Ivarkaḷ pakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya pāṭakattil peruṉānkellaiyāvaṉa kiḻpāṟkellai peruvaḻiyil nāṭṭina tiruccūlakkallukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai kunṟaṉ pirāntakatevaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Araiyar toṭṭattukku vaṭaveliyil nā
ṭṭina tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai veḷḷāṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ventarmaṉnan maṇaltoṭṭattu teṉtalaiyilālait tiruccūlakkallukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa Innilam Uṭaiya tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyanāṟkku tiruveṭṭai toppāka Āti taṇṭe
curatevar cikattattile nirvārttu kalveṭṭikkuṭutten caṅkaraṉ kaṇṭanāna kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya tevaneṉ Ivaiyen Eḻuttu ..ivai paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 22.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
